name: zitadel-idp
description: Zitadel self-hosted OIDC integration field guide. Captures the full set of high-friction quirks discovered while integrating Zitadel v4.x as the IdP for JRC Brasil ERP — FirstInstance env placement, volume permissions, v1/v2 API split, tenant→orgId mapping, JWT validation traps over self-signed HTTPS (NODE_EXTRA_CA_CERTS, JWKS over HTTPS), loginV2 instance flag, silent-renew redirect URI byte-match, JWT access token sem profile claims, idempotent bootstrap 'No changes' 400, TLS-terminating reverse proxy, secure-context PKCE on LAN, boot-time signinSilent recursion, StrictMode + closure cancelled flag, post_logout_redirect_uri invalid, branding da Login UI v1 / privateLabelingSetting / 405 em /assets/v1, custom_login_text e LANG-lg4DP, F5 com InMemoryWebStorage, 401 storm pós --reset-zitadel por tsx-watch zumbi, regressão multi-app YAML que sobrescreve env vars OIDC_REDIRECT_URIS dinâmicas, e Zitadel v2.66.x panic 'No master key provided' mesmo com env presente — fix com flag CLI '--masterkey' (env-var fallback do start-from-init é unreliable em v2.66, em v4 funciona). Bundles a working docker-compose.zitadel.yml, idempotent bootstrap-zitadel.ts and reset-zitadel.sh script. Use whenever starting Zitadel integration, debugging 4xx on Zitadel APIs, validating Zitadel JWTs in Node/TypeScript, customizing the hosted Login UI, or wiring an SPA via OIDC PKCE.
